common_allergens.label: Fragrance / Parfum
common_allergens.note: Common fragrance mix and parfum components can be irritating for reactive skin.

common_allergens.label: Limonene
common_allergens.note: Fragrance allergen often listed in perfumed formulas.

common_allergens.label: Linalool
common_allergens.note: Often appears in fragranced products and essential oil blends.

common_allergens.label: Citral
common_allergens.note: A fragrance component to avoid if you already know it is a trigger.

common_allergens.label: Geraniol
common_allergens.note: Common fragrance allergen in scented beauty products.

common_allergens.label: Eugenol
common_allergens.note: Clove-like fragrance component that can be irritating.

common_allergens.label: Cinnamal
common_allergens.note: Fragrance allergen sometimes used in scented cosmetics.

common_allergens.label: Benzyl Alcohol
common_allergens.note: Can appear in fragrance systems and preservation blends.

common_allergens.label: Essential Oils
common_allergens.note: Useful shortcut if you prefer to avoid aromatic essential oil blends.

sensitivity_exclusions.label: Niacinamide
sensitivity_exclusions.note: Some users prefer to avoid niacinamide in daily routines.

sensitivity_exclusions.label: Retinoids
sensitivity_exclusions.note: Helpful if retinoids feel too active for your current routine.

sensitivity_exclusions.label: AHA Acids
sensitivity_exclusions.note: Includes glycolic and lactic style resurfacing acids.

sensitivity_exclusions.label: Alcohol Denat.
sensitivity_exclusions.note: Useful when you want to avoid drying volatile alcohols.

sensitivity_exclusions.label: Mixed Acids
sensitivity_exclusions.note: Broad exclusion for acid-led exfoliating formulas.
